name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BodyRollUpHelper.VelocityOffset
summary: Offsets perceived body velocity.  Increase to create larger "dead zone" around zero velocity where character will be less rolled. (NB: Reset to 0 to match earlier behavior).
remarks:
Default value = 2.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
